1. Dates and Timing

Submission period ends August 17, 2026 at 4:00 PM EDT.

2. Sponsor

Example Sponsor.

3. Eligibility

  • Entrants must be adults where they reside.
  • Teams are allowed.

4. How To Enter

Build a working project.

Submission Requirements
  • Provide a repository URL.
  • Provide a demo video.
Intellectual Property

Open source is allowed when licenses are followed.

7. Intellectual Property Rights
